title: ArtsByAl3x's Lanterns x Hold My Items / Punchy
description: Lets your see ArtsByAl3x's special lanterns while holding them!
body:
This pack adds [HMI/Hold My Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items) and [Punchy](https://modrinth.com/mod/punchy-fpa) support to [ArtsByAl3x's Revamped Lanterns](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/revamped_lanterns_byartsbyal3x)!

PS: This can really work with anything if you change some things around in the resource pack, so i encourage you to dig around and make it work with whatever your heart desires. You also dont need to have Punchy or HMI to see the special things, i just think it looks better like that cause of the swinging effects
